posts.author: xsarahwong (Sarah Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request
Link to an item on a board view instead of the main table. Additionally, when a notification is sent, route the link to a specific board view based on a status column.

Use Case
I have a master request form with multiple groups and board views based on the request type (status column). When I write an update, the notification links to the main table. Since the main table contains all columns from every request type, it’s difficult to see the information related to their specific request type.

posts.author: maxmakhrov (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is cool feature
Also in tabular dashboard - each item should have link to the dashboard and that item.

In case item is filtered out the link becomes 404, that’s fine.
